title: Docker in CI/CD Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on containerized CI/CD pipelines.

questions.question: Regarding DevOps, what is a key benefit of using Docker within your CI/CD pipeline?
options: Building and testing your application's code in a single, portable, and consistent container environment

questions.question: Which of these is a key step in a Docker-based-CI/CD workflow?
options: Automatically creating a new container image for your project every time changes are pushed into your project repository
Recording a commit directly through SQL
Its only possible for SQL repositories
